response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, demonstrated leadership in open-source projects, and exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP, but lacks clear evidence of 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions, direct experience with vector databases or RAG architectures, and deep cloud-native AI system design — key requirements for this staff-level GenAI role.
strengths: Proven experience with AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling at re:cinq
Extensive full-stack expertise in TypeScript, Node.js, and cloud platforms (AWS CDK)
Strong track record of technical leadership, mentoring, and open-source contributions
concerns: No explicit mention of vector databases, RAG architectures, or LLM optimization in resume
AI experience appears incidental rather than core focus; insufficient evidence of 8+ years in production AI systems
Lacks demonstrated experience designing end-to-end AI evaluation pipelines or observability frameworks
